title: Valid Palindrome
description: Given a string s, return true if it is a palindrome, or false otherwise. A palindrome is a string that reads the same forward and backward after converting all uppercase letters to lowercase and removing all non-alphanumeric characters.
constraints: s consists of printable ASCII characters

examples.input: s = "A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"
examples.explanation: After cleaning, it becomes "amanaplanacanalpanama", which is a palindrome.
After cleaning, it becomes "raceacar", which is not a palindrome.

testCases.input: "A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"

hints: Convert all letters to lowercase before checking.
Use two pointers: one at the start and one at the end.
